dependencies.name: libxcb
dependencies.reason: The toolkit-neutral X11 connection directly uses system core XCB to select a screen and complete one checked server round trip.

dependencies.name: xorg-server
dependencies.fallback: A separately controlled X server may run the same transport integration binary.
dependencies.reason: The deterministic integration harness starts Xvfb through its displayfd interface and performs the real connection test without requiring a window manager.

unresolved.reason: Supported minimum libxcb and Xorg server versions remain unmeasured; the recorded versions are observations from the Gentoo reference VM.
EWMH capabilities, bounded property reads, event decoding, dock properties, and output policy remain later PD1 work.
